Signature Keynote

Where science fiction
meets artificial intelligence

Science fiction imagines the future; AI increasingly makes it real. Few speakers stand at that intersection like Dr. Philip Fischer, who pairs speculative fiction with a career as a fixed-income strategist and research analyst.

In this engaging keynote, author and technologist Dr. Fischer explores AI from a refreshingly human perspective. Drawing from his new book, You Are AI’s Best Friend — From Olives to Algorithms: A Human Guide, he explains complex AI concepts in plain English, replacing fear and hype with practical insight and genuine curiosity. Inspired by the timeless traditions of Sicily and the rapid evolution of modern technology, his message is simple: the future belongs to people who learn to work with AI, not against it.

Long before the AI revolution, his novels Julia and the Dream Maker and Green Eyes in the Amazon explored intelligence, identity, and technology, asking not just what advanced intelligence might become, but how it reshapes our relationships, our society, and ourselves. They anticipated questions now central to AI.

His newest book, You Are AI’s Best Friend — From Olives to Algorithms: A Human Guide (with Linda Marie Fischer), turns from imagining the future to living in it. Not threat, not miracle: the real opportunity comes when humans and AI collaborate, each bringing its own strengths.

This talk bridges both worlds. Fischer shows how science fiction serves as a laboratory for tomorrow’s ideas, and how today’s AI reveals which are becoming real. Understanding AI, he argues, takes not just technical knowledge but imagination.

What audiences leave with

  • A clear view of how science fiction shaped the AI era
  • How AI is fulfilling, and sometimes challenging earlier writers’ predictions
  • Why the partnership of human creativity and machine intelligence may be a defining story of this century

Thought Leadership

A human lens on
intelligent systems

True leadership unites vision with clarity. Dr. Fischer bridges macroeconomics, AI systems, and moral reasoning to help clients navigate technological and social disruption, guiding organizations to act with wisdom and care in a machine-driven age.

It is now apparent that we are in one of those ages of great human discovery and, to some degree, peril, a condition he has long spoken about in both his literature and his profession.

“Change is the future and it is our great hope.”
Key Services

Where people meet algorithms

Dr. Fischer provides direction to organizations, refining their mission in an era shaped by data, automation, and human values. His work centers on alignment between people and algorithms, ethics and innovation, purpose and performance.

“We are living through an exciting period, striving for the humanity and science of tomorrow.”

AI Trends

Foresight for a world
being rewritten

Artificial intelligence is redefining productivity, policy, and purpose. Global shifts in energy, demographics, and geopolitics demand new frameworks for value and trust.

Dr. Fischer helps leaders interpret these transformations, linking economic foresight with technological insight:

  • How does AI reshape growth and governance?
  • How can it serve human flourishing, not just efficiency?
  • What new assets (data, talent, and ethics) create advantage?
  • How can institutions stay human-centered as systems learn and decide?
Publications & Cultural Voice

A body of work spanning
fiction, finance & the future

Dr. Fischer’s writing explores the evolving dialogue between intelligence and humanity. In his latest book, You Are AI’s Best Friend — From Olives to Algorithms: A Human Guide, he reveals how artificial intelligence, in all its dimensions, is transforming what it means to think, create, and be human.

His earlier science-fiction works, Julia and the Dream Maker and its sequel Green Eyes in the Amazon, anticipated many of these themes more than two decades ago. On the corporate side, Investing in Municipal Bonds reflects his systems-level approach to muni bonds.

For Wealth Management Teams & Family Offices

Be the advisor who’s ahead on AI

Give your best clients a book that deals with what everyone’s asking about.

A gift that makes you look forward-thinking

Every client is asking about AI right now, and most feel anxious or lost. You Are AI’s Best Friend is a warm, plain-English guide with no hype, no fear, and no jargon. It turns anxiety into curiosity and confidence. Handing it to a client positions you as the advisor who helps them navigate the biggest topic of the year.

About the author

Philip Fischer, PhD, spent his career at the highest levels of Wall Street research, where he was Managing Director, Head of Municipal Bond Research and Indices, and Fixed Income Strategist at Bank of America Merrill Lynch. In this book he trades the jargon of both finance and technology for a genuinely human take on AI. That credibility is exactly why the book lands with sophisticated clients. It’s a finance leader’s guide, not a technologist’s.

eBooleant Consulting

Dr. Philip Fischer

Dr. Philip Fischer, BS ChE, JD, MBA, PhD, has a long history of answering difficult and complex questions from high-net-worth and institutional investors. He was formerly a Managing Director, Head of Municipal Bond Research and Indices, and Fixed Income Strategist at Bank of America Merrill Lynch, and a member of the Bank’s Research Investment Committee.

He has published both as an academic and as a Wall Street professional, and provided expert testimony on infrastructure to the Committee on Ways and Means, the chief tax-writing committee in the US House of Representatives. Today he runs eBooleant Consulting LLC, and his work centers on the economics and human meaning of AI. He also writes science fiction.
